'''thadofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mgt|mgt]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mgt|mgt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thadofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædefeth|thædefeth]] || [[word:thædefej|thædefej]] || [[word:thædefesh|thædefesh]] || [[word:thædefe|thædefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadodofoth|thadodofoth]] || [[word:thadodofoj|thadodofoj]] || [[word:thadodofosh|thadodofosh]] || [[word:thadodofo|thadodofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadofoth|thadofoth]] || [[word:thadofoj|thadofoj]] || [[word:thadofosh|thadofosh]] || [[word:thadofo|thadofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadoffoth|thadoffoth]] || [[word:thadoffoj|thadoffoj]] || [[word:thadoffosh|thadoffosh]] || [[word:thadoffof|thadoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thadofotho|thadofotho]] || [[word:thadofojo|thadofojo]] || [[word:thadofosho|thadofosho]] || [[word:thadofoko|thadofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thadofoth|thadofoth]] || [[word:thadofoj|thadofoj]] || [[word:thadofosh|thadofosh]] || [[word:thadofo|thadofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thadofothol|thadofothol]] || [[word:thadofojol|thadofojol]] || [[word:thadofoshol|thadofoshol]] || [[word:thadofokol|thadofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thadofothotho|thadofothotho]] || [[word:thadofojojo|thadofojojo]] || [[word:thadofoshosho|thadofoshosho]] || [[word:thadofoko|thadofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thadofothon|thadofothon]] || [[word:thadofojon|thadofojon]] || [[word:thadofoshon|thadofoshon]] || [[word:thadofokon|thadofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thadofothoro|thadofothoro]] || [[word:thadofojoro|thadofojoro]] || [[word:thadofoshoro|thadofoshoro]] || [[word:thadofokoro|thadofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
